节点.功能描述: ArrayList is a linear data structure that is implemented based on arrays. ArrayList can dynamically adjust the capacity based on project requirements. It increases the capacity by 50% each time.
A constructor used to create a ArrayList object.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 10200012 - The ArrayList's constructor cannot be directly invoked.

error_codes.description: The ArrayList's constructor cannot be directly invoked.

节点.功能描述: Gets the element number of the ArrayList.This is a number one higher than the highest index in the arraylist.
Appends the specified element to the end of this arraylist.
注释信息: @param { T } element - element element to be appended to this arraylist
@returns { boolean } the boolean type, returns true if the addition is successful, and returns false if it fails.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The add method cannot be bound.

parameters.说明: element element to be appended to this arraylist

节点.return_description: the boolean type, returns true if the addition is successful, and returns false if it fails.

节点.功能描述: Removes the first occurrence of the specified element from this arraylist, if it is present.  If the arraylist does not contain the element, it is unchanged.  More formally, removes the element with the lowest index

节点.功能描述: Replaces each element of this arraylist with the result of applying the operator to that element. callbackFn (required) A function that accepts up to three arguments. 节点.功能描述: Sorts this arraylist according to the order induced by the specified comparator,without comparator this parameter, it will default to ASCII sorting comparator (Optional) A function that accepts up to two arguments.Specifies the sort order. Must be a function,return number type,If it returns firstValue minus secondValue, it returns an arraylist sorted in ascending order;If it returns secondValue minus firstValue, it returns an arraylist sorted in descending order; If this parameter is empty, it will default to ASCII sorting 1.Incorrect parameter types; 2.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The sort method cannot be bound.

error_codes.description: The sort method cannot be bound.
